abstract.t:
Cloud services need to interoperate across providers, vendors and private/public domains. To enable this interoperability, there should be a standard way to exchange service information. The purpose of this document is to detail different kinds of information necessary to describe services. We identify the following kinds of service- dependant information needed for any kind of service:
- Method for naming services and identifying service classes.
- Method for describing syntax for properties of service classes.
- Method for defining semantics in a service class, by establishing
